headline: Hard mobile reset for overlapping entry sections by hiding deck-like explainers after the photo grid.
focus: Resolve persistent mobile overlap by removing problematic explainer sections from the public mobile entry.
notes: Hard-hidden guide/entry/rhythm explainer blocks on mobile because they continued overlapping the photo grid.
Kept hero, planner form, magazine cards, city cards, and generated result cards visible.
Limited first-entry photo grids to a safer mobile height.
This is a stronger structural hotfix rather than another light spacing patch.
